missions.title: Tag an Image
missions.story: Before pushing to a registry, images must be tagged with the destination. Tag the local image `myapp:latest` to target the local registry at `localhost:5000/myapp:v1`.
hints: `docker tag <source> <destination>` creates a new tag pointing to the same image

missions.title: Run a Local Registry
missions.story: You don't always need Docker Hub. Run a local Docker registry on port 5000.
objectives: Run a local registry container named `registry` from `registry:2` on port 5000 (detached)
hints: The official `registry:2` image runs a Docker-compatible registry

missions.title: Push to Local Registry
missions.story: Your local registry is running. Push `localhost:5000/myapp:v1` to it.
objectives: Push the image `localhost:5000/myapp:v1` to the local registry
hints: `docker push <image>` pushes to the registry encoded in the image name

initialState.summary: - Local registry running on port 5000 - `localhost:5000/myapp:v1` image tagged locally

workspaceFiles.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04
RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y curl
RUN apt-get install -y wget
RUN apt-get install -y git
CMD ["bash", "-lc", "echo mission ready"]

missions.title: Pull from Local Registry
missions.story: The image was pushed. Now remove the local copy and re-pull it from the registry to prove the registry works.
objectives: Pull it back from the registry
Run a container from it to verify
hints: `docker rmi` removes local image; `docker pull` re-downloads

missions.title: Image Layers and History
missions.story: Every Dockerfile instruction adds a layer. Understanding layers helps you optimize images. Inspect the layer history of `myapp:v1` and rebuild with optimized layers (fewer RUN commands merged).
objectives: Run `docker history myapp:v1` to see all layers
Identify layers that can be merged (multiple consecutive `RUN` commands)
Edit `/workspace/Dockerfile` to merge the RUN commands
Build `myapp:v2` and confirm it has fewer layers than `myapp:v1`
hints: `docker history <image>` shows all layers and their sizes
Merge multiple `RUN` commands with `&&` to reduce layer count

initialState.summary: - `myapp:v1` pre-built with at least 3 separate `RUN apt-get ...` instructions - `/workspace/Dockerfile` editable

workspaceFiles.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04
RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y curl
RUN apt-get install -y wget
RUN apt-get install -y git
CMD ["bash", "-lc", "echo mission ready"]
